name: Banner

variants.name: critical
variants.description: An issue has occurred that prevents further processing.

variants.name: warning
variants.description: A problem or inconsistency has arisen. Users can carry on working.
variants.when_to_use: Non-blocking issues that may cause errors later.

variants.name: success
variants.description: An action has been performed without errors or warnings.

variants.name: information
variants.when_to_use: Informing users about system or product-level context.

animated.note: Animate on first entry only. Never re-animate on page navigation.

placement.note: Banner placed above page content with layout spacing

usage_rules.rule: Only one banner at a time
usage_rules.detail: Never stack multiple banners. Only one banner should be visible at a time.

usage_rules.rule: Icon and color must match variant
usage_rules.detail: Always pair the correct semantic icon with the correct semantic color for the variant. Do not mix e.g. warning icon with critical color.
Only use the four provided variants. Do not introduce custom icons or background colors.

usage_rules.rule: Banner placement is above page content
usage_rules.detail: Banners must be placed above page content. In wizard mode, may be placed above the wizard top bar.
If animated, only animate when the banner first appears on a screen. Do not re-animate on page navigation within the same screen.

usage_rules.rule: For task-specific messages use Inline notification
usage_rules.detail: Banners are for system or product-level messages, not task-specific feedback. Use Inline notification for form or task errors.

accessibility.aria_live: assertive for critical, polite for others

confidence_blockers: If ticket requests multiple banners stacked, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket requests a task-specific error banner, suggest Inline notification instead.
agent_instructions.token_resolution: Always derive background, icon, and border colors from the same semantic variant group. Never mix tokens from different variant groups.

embedding_text: Banner component. System or product level non-task messages. Variants: critical blocking error, warning non-blocking issue, success confirmation, information context. Always one banner at a time never stack. Placed above page content. Semantic icon and color must match variant. No custom colors or icons.
